zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby於1378年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯時，他的父親Sir James De Bellers43歲，母親Margaret Bernake22歲。他和Elizabeth de Sutton至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1420年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾希森比享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby was born in 1378, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir James De Bellers, was 43 and his mother, Margaret Bernake, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elizabeth de Sutton. He died in 1420, in Sysonby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby est né en 1378, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James De Bellers, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bernake, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth de Sutton. Il est décédé en 1420, à Sysonby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Elizabeth de Sutton. Morì nel 1420, nel Sysonby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettlebyが1378年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ベラーズで生まれた時，父Sir James De Bellersは43歳，母Margaret Bernakeは22歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Suttonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1420年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシソンビーで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby(이)가 1378년 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James De Bellers(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bernake(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Sutton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 시손비에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bellers of Eye-Kettleby родился в 1378 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James De Bellers было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bernake, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elizabeth de Sutton. Он умер в 1420 г. в местности сисонби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
